title: Wobbelcraft
description: A Modpack that works good in Singel and Multiplayer | Adventure | + Tools | + Armor
body:
# **Wobbelcraft**
_the Modpack made for fun with Friends._

If you Like Adventuring and also like Randomness then this
is the Perfect Modpack for you!

Add it to Your Server or play it in Singelplayer and Travel through a World full of
Wild Animals and Dungeons. Craft Powerful Armor. Or Collect Heads and show them to your friends!!

_Wobbelcraft the Adventure!!!_
